basic_details.job_title: IIM Kashipur Psychiatrist / Psychologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kashipur (IIM Kashipur) has released the official Psychiatrist / Psychologist Notification 2026 on 19-05-2026 at IIM Kashipur Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIM Kashipur Psychiatrist / Psychologist Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with MBBS with PG Degree in Psychiatry / equivalent qualification with valid medical license and 5 years experience OR Post Graduate Degree in Clinical Psychology / equivalent with 5 years experience can apply through Email from 19-05-2026 to 29-05-2026. The official notification PDF and applica

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with PG Degree Or Post Graduate Degree in Clinical Psychology
qualification.details: MBBS with PG Degree in Psychiatry or equivalent from a recognized institution with a valid medical license and 5 years of experience. OR Post Graduate Degree in Clinical Psychology or equivalent from a recognized institution with 5 years of work/service experience in the relevant field.

salary_details.details: INR 3000/- per visit (Psychiatrist) or INR 2000/- per visit (Psychologist); 8 visits; Total INR 24000/- or INR 16000/-

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kashipur Retainer Psychiatrist / Psychologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to send your application via email is 29-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Retainer Psychiatrist / Psychologist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Retainer Psychiatrist / Psychologist post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their application via Email.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Retainer Psychiatrist / Psychologist post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an MBBS with a PG Degree in Psychiatry or a Post Graduate Degree in Clinical Psychology, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary ranges from Rs. 16000 to Rs. 24000, with specific per-visit rates mentioned.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the IIM Kashipur Retainer Psychiatrist / Psychologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an Application Review.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIM Kashipur located?
faq.answer: IIM Kashipur is located in Kashipur, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 244713.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a full-time or part-time job?
faq.answer: This is a Part Time job opportunity.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article.
